case_title: LILLIETH ACOSTA VS. BEE CHECK CASHING INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,967.84 FILED BY ACOSTA, LILLIETH AS TO DEFENDANT BEE CHECK CASHING INC. DBA CASA DE CAMBIO GABY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACOSTA, LILLIETH AS TO DEFENDANT BEE CHECK CASHING INC. DBA CASA DE CAMBIO GABY
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNDELIVERED TO DEFENDANT BEE CHECK CASHING INC.
TRIAL RESET TO APR-27-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-27-2012 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED MAR-07-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BEE CHECK CASHING INC. DBA CASA DE CAMBIO GABY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-27-2012 - CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER TO MAY-11-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "DEFENDANT IS HAVING TROUBLE EXPLAINING HER SIDE IN ENGLISH AND WANTS TO RETURN WITH A SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR A CONTINUED HEARING", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BEE CHECK CASHING INC. DBA CASA DE CAMBIO GABY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-11-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-15-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TO RETURN WITH A SPANISH INTERPRETER. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. JPT: MICHELE MCGILL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED 5/11/12 TO LILLIETH ACOSTA, "ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BEE CHECK CASHING INC. DBA CASA DE CAMBIO GABY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-15-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ANGEL MORALES--SPANISH INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY HAZEL ESTRADA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ACOSTA, LILLIETH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BEE CHECK CASHING INC. DBA CASA DE CAMBIO GABY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
